overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through Night City's rain-soaked neon-lit streets at night. The car navigates from ground level through covered overpasses, elevated highways, and narrow urban corridors, passing iconic landmarks like the Tyger Claws neon sign while surrounded by futuristic architecture and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy downtown street with hotel district

events.description: vehicle enters covered blue overpass structure with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through wet city streets at moderate speed, approaching covered overpass

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights on, approaching in opposite lane

entered.detail: large vertical neon sign with Japanese characters HOテル in pink and blue
elevated highway overpass with blue structural columns and green neon underlighting
rain-soaked multi-lane road with reflective surface showing neon reflections

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with the HOテル neon sign prominent on the right. The wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights as the car approaches and enters a blue overpass structure, transitioning from open sky to covered roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered overpass transitioning to open intersection

events.description: exits covered overpass into large open intersection with massive digital billboards
vehicle turns right and begins ascending elevated highway ramp

agents.ego_description: navigating through overpass, exiting to intersection, and ascending elevated ramp while turning right

entered.detail: tall digital screen displaying animated character advertisement with vivid colors
continuous wall of multiple digital screens showing various advertisements including EL CAMINO
curved highway ramp with guardrails ascending above street level

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the blue overpass into a vast intersection surrounded by towering digital billboards and anime advertisements. After navigating the open plaza, the car turns right and ascends a curved elevated ramp, gaining height above the city streets while the wet road surface continues to reflect the neon city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with panoramic city views

events.description: vehicle passes under massive red Tyger Claws neon sign spanning the highway

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed along elevated highway, passing under large neon signage

notable_agents.action: purple sedan driving ahead in same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: massive red neon sign with Japanese characters and TYGER CLAWS text spanning across the highway
metal safety barriers with red reflective strips along the elevated roadway edge
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: Driving high above the city on an elevated highway, the vehicle approaches the iconic Tyger Claws neon sign glowing red overhead. The panoramic city skyline stretches into the distance while the car passes under the massive signage, continuing along the rain-slicked elevated roadway with guardrails visible on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban corridor transitioning to palm-lined avenue

events.description: vehicle descends from elevated highway to street level via winding ramp
road widens into boulevard with palm trees and Kabayan restaurant sign becomes visible

agents.ego_description: descending from elevated highway through narrow streets, then navigating wider palm-lined avenue

entered.detail: red neon sign with KABAYAN text indicating restaurant or business establishment
tall palm trees lining the right side of the avenue, illuminated by streetlights
tall concrete and glass buildings forming a canyon-like corridor along the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends from the elevated highway into a narrow urban canyon between tall buildings, then emerges onto a wider boulevard lined with palm trees. The red Kabayan neon sign becomes visible ahead as the car continues through the rain-soaked streets, transitioning from enclosed corridors to more open avenues.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding alley with cherry blossoms and gang territory signage

events.description: vehicle passes through section with illuminated cherry blossom trees lining the narrow road
approaching and passing under the Tyger Claws neon sign again from different angle

agents.ego_description: navigating winding narrow streets through cherry blossom area and returning to Tyger Claws territory

notable_agents.action: red sports car parked on the right side of the narrow alley

entered.detail: pink illuminated cherry blossom trees with dense foliage creating a canopy effect over the road
the same massive red Tyger Claws neon sign viewed from the opposite direction or different street
close concrete building walls with various smaller neon signs and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle winds through a narrow alley illuminated by pink cherry blossom trees, creating a stark contrast with the surrounding concrete. The route circles back toward the Tyger Claws territory, with the massive red neon sign reappearing overhead as the car navigates the tight urban corridors and descends toward the final section of the drive.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis, transitioning from ground-level streets to elevated highways before descending back into narrow urban corridors. It begins on a wet asphalt road beneath a prominent HOテル neon sign, moving forward as the car enters a blue overpass that shields it from the open sky. As the vehicle exits the structure into a vast intersection of digital billboards, it ascends a curved ramp to reach an elevated highway, passing under the massive red glow of the Tyger Claws signage against a panoramic skyline. The scene then shifts as the car descends from the heights into a narrow urban canyon, emerging onto a palm-lined boulevard marked by a red Kabayan sign. Finally, the route winds through a tight alley illuminated by pink cherry blossom trees before circling back toward the towering red neon of the Tyger Claws territory.
